description: Style Noteallen solly was formed in 1744 in Nottingham, England. Their handbags are creatively engineered to cater to the woman of today. Make a style statement effortlessly with this simply silhouetted blended fabric clutch. With classy stitch detailing, this clutch in purple makes a fabulous combination of style and practicality.Product DetailsMade from a velvet fabricHas one roomy compartment with a magnetic buttoned closure and an inner pouchOne small removable handle with a long removable chain strap for carrying easeBrand name embossed on a small placard looped through the chain strap on the sideMaterial and CareBlended fabricWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustSizeHeight: 12 cmWidth: 31 cm
